scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:plugin && npm run test:e2e:components
scripts.test:e2e:plugin: nix develop -c npm exec -- tui-test tests/e2e/target-picker.test.ts tests/e2e/thread-panel.test.ts tests/e2e/comments/*.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:components: nix develop -c npm exec -- tui-test tests/storybook/*.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:artifacts: npm run test:e2e:plugin:artifacts && npm run test:e2e:components:artifacts
scripts.test:e2e:plugin:artifacts: UNIFIED_REVIEW_E2E_ARTIFACTS=1 nix develop -c npm exec -- tui-test tests/e2e/target-picker.test.ts tests/e2e/thread-panel.test.ts tests/e2e/comments/*.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:components:artifacts: UNIFIED_REVIEW_E2E_ARTIFACTS=1 nix develop -c npm exec -- tui-test tests/storybook/*.test.ts
